harbouR 0.1.0
    • Reference
      • Column types and coercion
      • The harbouR explorer
    • Changelog

    Package index

    Client & authentication

    hb_client() print(<harbour_client>)
    Create a SeaTable client
    hb_ping()
    Ping the SeaTable server
    hb_server_info()
    Server information
    is_harbour_client()
    Test whether an object is a harbour client

    Metadata

    hb_metadata()
    Fetch base metadata
    hb_list_tables()
    List the tables in a base
    hb_list_collaborators()
    List collaborators of the active base
    hb_column_types()
    SeaTable column type mapping
    print(<harbour_metadata>)
    Print method for harbour metadata
    as_tibble(<harbour_metadata>)
    Coerce harbour metadata to a tibble
    summary(<harbour_metadata>)
    Summary of harbour metadata
    is_harbour_metadata()
    Test whether an object is harbour metadata

    Rows

    hb_read_table()
    Read a table as a tibble
    hb_query()
    Run a SeaTable SQL query
    hb_get_row()
    Get a single row by ID
    hb_append_rows()
    Append rows to a table
    hb_update_rows()
    Update rows in a table
    hb_delete_rows()
    Delete rows
    hb_lock_rows()
    Lock rows
    hb_unlock_rows()
    Unlock rows

    Tables

    hb_create_table()
    Create a table
    hb_rename_table()
    Rename a table
    hb_delete_table()
    Delete a table
    hb_duplicate_table()
    Duplicate a table

    Columns

    hb_list_columns()
    List columns of a table
    hb_add_column()
    Add a column to a table
    hb_add_columns()
    Add several columns at once
    hb_update_column()
    Update a column
    hb_delete_column()
    Delete a column
    hb_add_select_option()
    Add a single-select option
    hb_update_select_option()
    Update a single-select option
    hb_delete_select_option()
    Delete a single-select option

    Views

    hb_list_views()
    List views of a table
    hb_get_view()
    Get a view's settings
    hb_create_view()
    Create a view
    hb_update_view()
    Update a view
    hb_delete_view()
    Delete a view

    Files

    hb_upload_file()
    Upload a file to SeaTable
    hb_attach_file()
    Attach a file to a cell
    hb_download_file()
    Download an asset
    hb_delete_asset()
    Delete an asset

    Example data

    hb_example_metadata()
    Offline example metadata
    hb_example_rows()
    Offline example rows

    Shiny explorer

    hb_run_explorer()
    Launch the harbouR explorer
